```{=latex}
\newpage

\hypertarget{acknowledgements}{\chapter*{Acknowledgements}\label{acknowledgements}}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Acknowledgements}
```

> *Research is what I'm doing when I don't know what I'm doing.*

I've lived this definition of research, commonly attributed to Wernher von Braun, on and off for the better part of four years now. That would not have been possible without the support and encouragement of many people, several of which I'd like to acknowledge here.


I would like to thank...

::: content-hidden

parents - for developing me into the overwhelmingly curious and reasonably skeptical person I am

scott - for modeling strength of character

A portion of this research was funded by ICAMS Oshkosh project.

grad certificate instructors: Alice Smith, Jeff Smith, Jorge Valenzuela for giving me the tools and understanding I needed to jump start this effort

:::
